nodes.label: AI capturing personal creative voice
nodes.label_negative: AI failing to capture personal style
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like it can ever really capture my style

nodes.label: AI for client work vs personal work
nodes.grounding_span: I do use AI in video scripting when I'm doing client videos. I don't use it for my own videos

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI can be very helpful in finding details and stories... when it's honest

nodes.label: AI as creative director requiring heavy guidance
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely driving the creative decisions. That's the only way to get anything good out of it

nodes.label: AI enabling new creative possibilities
nodes.grounding_span: AI opens up that possibility for me

nodes.label: AI ethics in style and voice appropriation
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry a great deal about how AI learns creative writing (lifting the voices of popular authors)

nodes.label: AI market saturation with low-quality content
nodes.label_negative: AI maintaining or improving content quality
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the market being crowded with awful books

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: My writing has (and should have) a very distinctive style. It's my voice

nodes.label: Financial sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: I also want to make money. That's what buys travel and coffee

nodes.label: Creative control and authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: Ethical integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I want to know that I'm not stealing someone else's style when I use it

nodes.label: Rejection of AI for personal creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI for my own videos

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI for client work
nodes.grounding_span: I do use AI in video scripting when I'm doing client videos

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for research
nodes.grounding_span: I always double-check any 'facts' I get from AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's creative limitations
nodes.grounding_span: AI was still an absolutely terrible writer

nodes.label: Hope for AI enabling new projects
nodes.grounding_span: AI opens up that possibility for me

nodes.label: Ethical concern about AI style appropriation
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry a great deal about how AI learns creative writing

nodes.label: Concern about market saturation
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the market being crowded with awful books

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it for my own videos, because I don't feel like it can ever really capture my style

nodes.label: Iterative directive refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I take a portion of what it writes (if it's good) or tell it what to change (if it isn't), and tell it how to expand it
